title: Manufacturing Engineer - Luminous Power Technologies - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Luminous Power Technologies - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? Luminous Power Technologies in Pune offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Luminous Power Technologies:
Luminous Power Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Luminous Power Technologies!
